data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for completion photo evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the completion photo evidence requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of endpoints or entities capable of validating this requirement. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address the specific need for completion photo evidence, leading to an inconclusive status. The only related evidence discusses the creation of bookings and resources, which do not directly support the validation of completion photo evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for validating completion photo evidence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for completion photo evidence.
